coverage_verdict: P2 structured outputs are partially covered; source documents have been extracted into text and planning semantics, but DWG geometry remains unparsed, and calibration-intensive inputs (visitor flow, revenue, cost, exact coordinates, layers) are still missing or placeholders, keeping the overall status as needs_review.
must_not_claim: 候选评分是最终选址排序
recommended_next_checks: Execute DWG conversion for north and south park files and parse layer/geometry information.
Obtain a readable CAD proxy (PDF or DXF) for the south park to verify spatial nodes.
Collect real visitor flow data by entrance, node, and time for simulation calibration.
Define and calibrate business format conversion rate assumptions with field or benchmark evidence.
Secure revenue, cost, rent, and sharing parameters from operational plans or comparable cases.
Validate operator authorization, lease feasibility, and construction/renovation permissions for each project node.
handoff_summary: P2 has extracted DOCX plan semantics (6 project nodes, 12 assumptions) and PDF spatial labels from the north park CAD proxy, with gaps explicitly registered. DWG geometry is not yet parsed, south park lacks a spatial proxy, and all financial/flow/calibration inputs remain missing or unverified. The structured candidate list is ready for schema review and gap resolution before any full simulation.
